Discovery: President and CEO Carey Smith bought 12,500 shares open market at ~$50 on May 8, 2026, a meaningful purchase at a defense and intelligence technology company that benefits directly from the Pentagon's accelerated spending on cyber, missile defense, and space programs.
value_picks.analyst_take: CEO open-market buy + multiple May contract wins convergence; 39% to analyst consensus; cyber/missile defense spending secular
